items.title: Terminologies for Categorized Adverse Event Reporting (AER): terms, terminology and codes
items.text: Terminologies for Categorized Adverse Event Reporting (AER): terms, terminology and codes The Excel version of the 2025 release of the IMDRF terminology is a single file instead of a separate file for each annex. Each annex is provided in a separate sheet within the main file. The structure and layout of each annex sheet is unchanged from the last release. IMDRF/AE WG/N43 FINAL:2020 (below) is the guidance document outlining the concept behind the IMDRF Terminology including terms, definitions and IMDRF alpha-numerical codes to be used for Adverse Event (AE) reporting concerning medical devices and in vitro diagnostics. Annexes A-G provide the detailed terms, definitions and IMDRF alpha-numerical codes in JSON format. Appendix B is the log documenting all changes in the codes & terms. This file is updated annually to highlight differences from the previous maintenance period. Release Notes provides notes on the most current release for the terms, definitions and IMDRF alpha-numerical codes detailed in the documents above.

items.title: Principles and Practices for Medical Device Cybersecurity
items.text: Principles and Practices for Medical Device Cybersecurity IMDRF N-series guidance document.

mappings.notes: IMDRF principles align with lifecycle safety/performance and cybersecurity expectations.
Cybersecurity vulnerability handling supports CAPA expectations.

applicability_rules.notes: IMDRF SaMD definitions and clinical evaluation concepts apply.
Lifecycle cybersecurity principles apply to connected devices.
